metadata.name: Lights Out Shenanigans
metadata.description:
I decided to make another game to go with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3652641151]Minesweeper Shenanigans[/url].
This mod requires REPENTOGON. All boards are solvable. 2x2 and 4x4 are super easy if you need a place to start.
There's an option to print a solution to the debug console if you get stuck. Click on all the 1's in any order to solve from the current state. The solution may not be optimal.
More info: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lights_Out_(game)
Update: You can change the pattern from a cross (+) to a cross (x).
